title: StudyLink
description: A platform designed to streamline the process for students to find and connect with study partners with ease.

title: JobSwipe
description: A swipe-style job board that auto-fills Greenhouse application forms.

title: League of Legends Analysis
description: An analysis of the extent to which a team's vision control in League of Legends influences its likelihood of winning.

title: Personal Portfolio
description: A multi-page personal portfolio built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, featuring dynamic navigation, theme switching, and reusable project rendering.

title: Data Visualization Critique
description: A visualization project focused on evaluating design choices such as color, encoding, layout, and clarity in communicating data-driven insights.

title: San Francisco Activity Guide Website
description: A frontend website built with HTML, CSS, and Bootstrap that presents places to eat, play, and relax in San Francisco.

title: Huffman Coding Compression Tool
description: A C++ file compression and decompression program using Huffman trees, priority queues, bit-level file I/O, and custom encoding.

title: Graph Algorithms in C++
description: A C++ graph project implementing graph construction, BFS, Dijkstra’s algorithm, connected components, and threshold-based connectivity.

title: Yelp Restaurant Survival Model
description: A Python data science project investigating restaurant survival patterns using Yelp data, exploratory analysis, and predictive modeling.

title: Action Recognition with Accelerometer Data
description: A signal processing project using accelerometer data and frequency-domain features to classify activities such as standing, walking, and jogging.

title: Interactive Algorithm Visualizer
description: A web-based visualization tool that animates algorithms such as BFS, DFS, and Dijkstra’s algorithm to help users understand graph traversal.

title: Interactive Data Dashboard
description: A web-based dashboard that visualizes datasets with filters, charts, and interactive components to explore trends and insights.
